data.body:
COMPLETED. Added recent_session_logs across all three interfaces:
- Core: recent_session_logs_state(tracker, limit=5) in _engine_support/reads.py — includes session_logs (exclude_session_logs defaults False), excludes archived/deleted, sorts by created_at ns desc, limit<=0 -> [].
- Library: rebar.recent_session_logs(limit=5, repo_root=) (+ __all__).
- CLI: rebar session-logs [--output json|llm] [--limit=<n>] (reader profile; --limit validated as positive int) — registered in reads._COMMANDS and _cli._READS_INIT_ONLY; help txt + overview + golden snapshots added.
- MCP: recent_session_logs tool returning list[TicketStateOut] (auto outputSchema).
- Schema: registered session_logs/session_logs.llm -> TICKET_STATE(_LLM); wired into both coverage guards (CLI + MCP).

Code review caught a help/handler mismatch (help advertised --output text but reader profile only allows json|llm) — fixed to json|llm.

Tests: tests/interfaces/queries/test_recent_session_logs.py covers ordering (newest-first), default+custom limit, limit>count, empty store, non-positive limit, and library==CLI==MCP parity. Full offline tier: 2082 passed, 0 failed. ruff clean.
